caption: The video features a woman with shoulder-length black hair and glasses, wearing a light green top with floral embroidery. She is seated against a plain black background, which helps to focus attention on her. The woman appears to be speaking or presenting, as indicated by the microphone clipped to her shirt. Her hand gestures suggest she is explaining or emphasizing a point, with one hand raised and fingers extended while the other hand is slightly clenched. The setting seems formal, possibly an educational or professional presentation, given the logo "NPTEL" visible in the bottom left corner of the frame. Her expression and body language convey engagement and confidence as she communicates her message.
